asset.title: L5 Large Range
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The animation clearly demonstrates a 5-row windowing and locking workflow on a large spreadsheet model. It step-by-steps the lock, read, write, and release sequence with clear annotations.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates row-level locking and targeted window loading clearly through step-by-step visual updates.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete lifecycle from initial load, locking, reading, writing, to lock release.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed layout with clear typography, though highly abstracted.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom concept of versioned edits and agent-based sheet operations.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Functions well as an explanatory workflow diagram, though it is simulated rather than a raw UI capture.

legibility.evidence: High contrast text and clear step counters make it easy to follow at any scale.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for developers interested in concurrency, CAS, and large-scale sheet performance.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents a conceptual model execution sequence without pretending to be a full IDE.

observedEvidence: Version increment from V1 to V2 on write
Status bar showing AI steps 0/4 through 4/4

defects.observed: The UI is highly abstracted and simulated, which may not represent the final user-facing application interface.
defects.fix: Add a small disclaimer or ensure surrounding documentation clarifies that this is a conceptual trace replay.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Visual trace of NodeRoom's L5 model executing a localized 5-row window lock, read, and versioned write operation on a large range.
